idea-plugin.name: Documentation First
idea-plugin.description:
Make your documentation a superpower contextual memory for your AI agent.

Documentation First — DDD v2 for agentic AI. Structures collaboration between developer and AI agent through a living .ai_context/ folder.
Agent-agnostic: works with JetBrains AI, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, or any assistant.

How it works:
Write specs → AI reads context → AI implements → AI writes done report → commit → next task

Features:
  • Auto-detects .ai_context/ on project open and prompts initialization
  • Initialize project: agent profile, vision, steps (roadmap), first task
  • New Task: select completed step, choose specs to delete, scaffold next task
  • New Vision: reset roadmap and tasks, preserve permanent context
  • DDD tool window: tree view of specification/, done/, technical/, steps/, skills/
  • Permanent files (permanent-*) survive all context resets
  • Task history in history.json (JSON Lines, append-only)

Learn more at documentationfirst.ai
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.1
  • Steps retrospective Task
  • Spec file auto-created
  • Selective spec deletion
  • Quick init mode
  • generated `CONTRACT.md` now includes a session close protocol
  • Step list in New Task
  • New Vision and New Task actions
  • All UI labels translated to English
1.0.0
  • Initial release
  • Full DDD v2 lifecycle: init → vision → steps → tasks → done
  • Selective spec deletion on New Task
  • Spec file auto-created for each new task
  • Agent-agnostic: pure Markdown + Git, no external service

action.description: Initialize .ai_context/ with templates, vision, steps and first task
Rewrite vision.md, reset steps/ and tasks/ (non-permanent)
Archive current task, select specs to delete, scaffold next task
